Pro Tools 11 ‒ Avid Video Engine ‒ Avid
description: Play and edit HD video right in the Pro Tools timeline-without transcoding. With the built-in Avid Video Engine-the same core engine as in Media Composer-you can add, edit, and play a variety of HD video formats (such as QuickTime, XDCAM, and more) and Avid DNxHD sequences directly in the Pro Tools timeline-without transcoding. Plus, you can monitor the picture playback using video interfaces from Avid, AJA, and Blackmagic Design. Get an in-depth walkthrough of Pro Tools 11.

title: The Agentic AI Pioneers - The Partnership Between Google Cloud and Avid - Making the Media S6E11
description: The new partnership between Google and Avid will drive innovative new workflows in news and post production. Generative AI from Google Gemini is now available directly in Media Composer, and Google search is powering content discovery in Avid Content Core to deliver efficiencies for production teams. In this episode, we explore the partnership, the practicalities of what AI in production can bring, and why it remains critical that AI is an assistant to the editor or the journalist, not the one who is in control. Watch to discover - Why Google is partnering with Avid to deliver innovative AI workflows - Google Gemini is being integrated into Media Composer - The astounding search and content recommendation capabilities in Avid Content Core MORE EPISODES youtube.com/playlist?list=PLhCR_8aS9jOPznbYIaFJJNCXTtsHKua_8 Discover Avid Content Core Discover Avid Media Composer Discover Avid Media Composer Extensions Discover Avid NEXIS storage solutions About Google Cloud Google Cloud offers a comprehensive suite of cloud computing services...
